schema_notes: Anchor facts only. JSON shape, field names, and filenames are the executor's choice — the grader checks semantic content, not key naming. Anchored to arxiv:2304.03442v2 (Generative Agents: Interactive Simulacra of Human Behavior, Park et al. 2023). Snapshot date 2026-05-02.

paper.title: Generative Agents: Interactive Simulacra of Human Behavior
paper.abstract_first_100_chars: Believable proxies of human behavior can empower interactive applications ranging from immersive env

semantic_scholar.venue: ACM Symposium on User Interface Software and Technology
semantic_scholar.first_author_top_other_paper_title: Social Simulacra: Creating Populated Prototypes for Social Computing Systems

expected_characterisation.academic_impact: highly cited (>3000 citations on Semantic Scholar)
expected_characterisation.code_reception: actively reproduced — joonspk-research/generative_agents is the official author repo, plus several community forks/reimplementations
expected_characterisation.community_reception: strong HN attention — top story (id 35517649) has ~391 points at snapshot, plus a follow-up open-source-release story

paper_to_implementation_chronology.method_hint: For each candidate GitHub repo, get the earliest commit via gh api: (1) `gh api -i repos/<r>/commits?per_page=1` -> read Link header `rel="last"` page number; (2) `gh api repos/<r>/commits?per_page=1&page=<last>&sha=<default_branch> --jq .[0].commit.author.date`. Compute days_since_paper_publish = first_commit_date - 2023-04-07. Repo `created_at` is a usable proxy when pagination fails (typically same day as first commit). The user's prompt anchors on top 3 GitHub implementations BY STARS — at the snapshot this is joonspk-research/generative_agents (21k+ stars, official), mkturkcan/generative-agents (~995 stars), nmatter1/smallville (~763 stars).
paper_to_implementation_chronology.earliest_implementation_finding: The community got out ahead of the paper team: mkturkcan/generative-agents shipped its first commit on 2023-04-11, just 4 days after the paper was posted to arxiv. The official author repo (joonspk-research/generative_agents) only landed on 2023-07-23 — 107 days post-paper, presumably timed to a code release rather than an immediate reproduction effort.
paper_to_implementation_chronology.tolerance: first_commit_date is sourced from immutable git history and will not change. days_since_paper is exact. The grader accepts ±3 days on stated gap values to absorb any rounding/timezone edge cases (e.g. UTC vs local). The earliest-implementation identification (mkturkcan being first of the top 3) is the stable rank-1 property and must be correctly identified.

tolerances.citation_count: ≥ 3000 (any value at or above this; Semantic Scholar citationCount grows monotonically over time)
tolerances.hn_top_story_id: exact '35517649' or any reference to news.ycombinator.com/item?id=35517649
